result.evidence_summary: The official website finlandiahiihto.fi provides detailed event information, recent race results (e.g., winners Kati Roivas, Miro Karppanen, Hilla Niemelä, Veeti Pyykkö), registration pages, program schedules, history since 1973/1974, and organization details by Lahti Ski Club and Hollola Athletics. It mentions YouTube coverage at www.youtube.com/finlandiahiihto and Worldloppet/Ski Classics affiliations. News updates cover weather adjustments, snowmaking, and the 53rd event planned for February 7-8, 2026.
